objective: Harden existing CLI supervisor and PR merge/check tooling so known Claude stream-json, Codex reasoning-effort, pending-check, and local-main merge failure modes are enforced or classified deterministically.
scope_boundary: Update existing supervisor and automerge evaluator surfaces only.
Add focused regression tests for native Claude/Codex argv and pending PR checks.
Record governance evidence for issue #536 under the session guardrail reliability epic.
out_of_scope: Implementing the consumer verifier acceptance gate from issue #537.
Implementing the session error KB/runbook slice from issue #535.
Creating a live PR merger or polling daemon.
research_summary: Local and GitHub inspection showed issue #536 open with no PR, model-pin checks already PR-visible in reusable governance CI, and existing tooling gaps in native CLI argv coverage plus pending PR check classification. The implementation tightens the existing supervisor and automerge evaluator in place.

sprints.name: Supervisor and PR contract hardening
sprints.goal: Make invalid supervised CLI invocations impossible and classify PR pending/merge states without local-main dependency.
tasks: Auto-add Claude --verbose for stream-json output format.
Require Codex native sessions to include model_reasoning_effort.
Add direct native argv regression tests for Claude and Codex.
Separate pending required checks from final blockers in automerge evaluation.
Add GitHub-native update/merge guidance to automerge output.
acceptance_criteria: Claude stream-json supervisor argv includes --verbose exactly once.
Codex native supervisor argv includes -m and model_reasoning_effort.
Missing Codex reasoning effort is rejected by the governed wrapper.
Pending required checks produce pending state rather than final blocker state.
Local-main mergeability probes are blocked and merge guidance uses GitHub-native commands.
Model-pin enforcement is verified as PR-visible through reusable governance CI.

specialist_reviews.focus: Existing supervisor and PR gate contracts
specialist_reviews.summary: The bounded implementation updates existing enforcement surfaces and avoids live PR mutation logic.

alternate_model_review.summary: Bounded Tier 2 guardrail repair with deterministic tests; no new standard or cross-family plan review required.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implementation may update supervisor, automerge evaluator, focused tests, and issue #536 governance evidence only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused tests, governance validators, local CI gate, then open and merge PR after green checks.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Implementation stays inside allowed write paths.
Stage 6 closeout and self-learning evidence are present.

material_deviation_rules: If live PR mutation logic is needed, split to a follow-up issue.
If model-pin workflows are not PR-visible, wire the existing reusable checks instead of adding a new model-pin checker.
If implementation needs downstream repo writes, stop and open downstream follow-up issues.
